# VATSSA Sector File Development for FVHF Harare

[![latest-version](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/VATSIM-SSA/sectorfile-fvhf?include_prereleases)](https://github.com/VATSIM-SSA/sectorfile-fvhf/releases) [![topsky-version](https://img.shields.io/badge/TopSky-2.4.1-blue.svg)](https://forum.vatsim-scandinavia.org/t/topsky)
[![gr-version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ground%20Radar-1.5-blue.svg)](https://forum.vatsim-scandinavia.org/t/ground-radar) [![pbf-version](https://img.shields.io/badge/PushbackFlorian-1.1.0-blue.svg)](https://github.com/MorpheusXAUT/PushbackFlorian) [![vch-version](https://img.shields.io/badge/vCH-0.8.4-blue.svg)](https://github.com/DrFreas/VCH) [![vfpc-version](https://img.shields.io/badge/vFPC-2.1.1-blue.svg)](https://github.com/hpeter2/VFPC)

## Introduction

This is the Sector File Development Repository for the FVHF Harare FIR for use on EuroScope as part of the VATSIM online ecosystem. It is not meant to be used for any real-world aviation capability.

This repository contains the files maintained by hand, outside our sector file provider AeroNav GNG: plugins, settings and manuals.

> [!NOTE]
> Full sector file packages are built and hosted on AeroNav GNG. The GitHub releases here do **not** contain every file needed to run the sector file.

## Overview

The Harare FIR covers the entirety of Zimbabwe. It is neighboured by the Johannesburg (South Africa) FIR to the south, Gaborone and a tip of Windhoek to the west, Lusaka to the north, and Beira to the east.

## Countries & Territories

- Zimbabwe

## Key Airports

- FVBU | Joshua Mqabuko Nkomo Intl (Bulawayo, Zimbabwe)
- FVFA | Victoria Falls Intl (Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe)
- FVRG | Robert Gabriel Mugabe Intl (Harare, Zimbabwe)

## Releases & Installation

Full sector file releases are available on [AeroNav GNG](https://files.aero-nav.com/FVHF).

For setup, see the VATSSA [EuroScope & Sector File Installation Guide](https://docs.vatssa.com/New-Controllers/).

> [!WARNING]
> Releases published on GitHub do not include all essential files for the sector file. Always install the complete package from AeroNav GNG.

## How to Contribute

For more information on how to contribute, please refer to VATSSA's Sector File Development Overview Repository [How to Contribute](https://github.com/VATSIM-SSA/sectorfile-overview/wiki/How-to-Contribute) page.

### Bugs, feedback & suggestions

We track everything sector-file-related on the GitHub issue board: bug reports, feature suggestions, discussions and documentation.

> [!TIP]
> Found a bug or have an idea? Open an issue. This covers anything related to the sector file, even parts not directly maintained on GitHub (for example vATIS).

## Discord

Sector file development is coordinated on the **VATSSA Discord**. To get involved, reach out VATSSA7.

---

Part of the [VATSSA Sector File project](https://github.com/VATSIM-SSA). Maintained by the VATSSA Sector File Development team.
